title: The Crucible
writer: Arthur Miller, Jean-Paul Sartre, Marcel Aymé
actors: Simone Signoret, Yves Montand, Jean Debucourt
plot: Salem 1692. The young Abigail, seduced and abandoned by John Proctor, accuses John's wife of being a witch in revenge. It will be the beginning of a series of witchcraft trials and a dark moment in American history.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award3 wins & 2 nominations total
